-- 1 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] (ii) पैरा सं. 5 म犆, 灙म सं榐या (10) और उससे संबिधत 灹िवि瀠टय犘 के 瀡थान पर िन瀓निलिखत रखा जाएगा, अथा榁त्:- ''10. 炈ी िववेक पांडे, वै榀ािनक ‘बी’ चंडीगढ़ 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण सिमित, चंडीगढ़ …सद瀡य; 11. अपर िनदेशक, पया榁वरण िवभाग, चंडीगढ़ 灹शासन …सद瀡य सिचव’’; [फा.सं. जे-11013/21/2007-आईए.II(I)] 榀ानेश भारती, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पण ण ण ण : मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण,,,, भाग II,,,, खंड 3, 3, 3, 3, उपखंड (ii) (ii) (ii) (ii) म犆 का.आ. सं榐यांक 1723(अ),,,, तारीख 12 मई,,,, 2016 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी । MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th May, 2018 S.O. 2203(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986) and in pursuance of the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.O. 1533(E), dated the 14th September, 2006, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 1723(E), dated the 12th May, 2016, namely:- In the said notification, - (i) in the opening paragraph, for serial number 1 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- ‘‘1. Shri Srishti Pal Vasudeva, Indian Forest Service (Retired), H. Sh. Vivek Pandey, Scientist ‘B', Chandigarh Pollution Control Committee, Chandigarh. …Member; 11. Additional Director, Department of Environment, Chandigarh Administration. …Member Secretary.’’. [F. No. J-11013/21/ 2007- IA.II (I)] GYANESH BHARTI, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 1723(E), dated the 12th May, 2016.
